abi: function addRecord(address _patient, uint8 _recordType, string _ipfsCID, bytes32 _integrityHash) returns (uint256)

function getRecord(uint256 _recordId) returns (tuple(uint256 id, uint8 recordType, address patientAddress, address providerAddress, string ipfsCID, bytes32 integrityHash, uint256 timestamp, uint256 version, bool isDeleted))
function checkAccess(uint256 _recordId) view returns (bool hasPermission, string reason)
function getPatientRecordIds(address _patient, uint256 _offset, uint256 _limit) view returns (uint256[] ids, uint256 total)
function writePrescription(address _patient, string _ipfsCID, uint8 _refills, uint256 _validDays) returns (uint256)

function getPrescription(uint256 _rxId) view returns (tuple(uint256 id, uint256 recordId, address prescriber, address dispensedBy, uint8 status, uint8 refillsRemaining, uint256 expiresAt, string ipfsCID))
function getPatientPrescriptionIds(address _patient, uint256 _offset, uint256 _limit) view returns (uint256[] ids, uint256 total)
function getAuditTrail(uint256 _recordId) view returns (tuple(address accessor, uint256 recordId, string action, uint256 timestamp, bool isEmergency)[])
function hasRole(bytes32 role, address account) view returns (bool)
event RecordAdded(uint256 indexed id, address indexed patient, address indexed provider, uint8 recordType)
event RecordUpdated(uint256 indexed id, address indexed updatedBy, uint256 version)
event RecordDeleted(uint256 indexed id, address indexed deletedBy)
event AccessGranted(address indexed patient, address indexed grantee, uint256 recordId, uint256 expiresAt)
event AccessRevoked(address indexed patient, address indexed grantee, uint256 recordId)
event PrescriptionWritten(uint256 indexed prescriptionId, address indexed patient, address indexed prescriber)
event PrescriptionDispensed(uint256 indexed prescriptionId, address indexed pharmacist)
event EmergencyAccess(address indexed accessor, address indexed patient, uint256 timestamp)
event AuditLogged(address indexed accessor, uint256 indexed recordId, string action)
